metadata.text: Led full-stack delivery of AI-powered search and HR automation platform using React.js, Node.js/NestJS, and Spring Boot microservices on AWS EKS — serving 100K+ MAU with WebSocket and SSE real-time streaming
Architected event-driven microservices with Kafka and domain-driven design principles, enabling decoupled real-time data pipelines across product modules and well-defined service boundaries
Established API-first standards with OpenAPI v3 contracts and automated breaking change detection, enabling daily CI/CD deployments via GitHub Actions across backend and frontend teams
Led technical design sessions and code reviews across three cross-functional squads, converting architecture decisions into low-level designs and production Spring Boot and React features
Introduced AI-assisted engineering tooling (Claude Code, Cursor) org-wide, increasing per-engineer delivery throughput by 57.8%
Established full-stack technology foundation as founding engineer — Spring Boot microservices, Angular, PostgreSQL, MongoDB on AWS EKS — architecture still running in production 5+ years later
Designed RESTful APIs with OpenAPI v3 specifications and typed client SDK generation, reducing cross-team integration errors by 80%
Built real-time chat backend integrating LLM APIs over WebSocket on Spring Boot, directly contributing to a 10% increase in sales conversion
Delivered shared Angular UI component library and cross-platform mobile components, accelerating feature delivery across web and mobile product surfaces
Built distributed IoT telemetry platform on Microsoft Azure Event Hub processing real-time data from 10,000+ connected devices with sub-second latency using event-driven architecture
Designed and maintained RESTful microservices in Spring Boot and Node.js for a multi-tenant SaaS product serving global enterprise telecom clients
Led migration from monolithic backend to independently deployable Spring Boot microservices, improving deployment velocity and horizontal scaling capabilities
